title: aaif-goose/goose keeps climbing as an open-source coding agent

summary: goose is an open-source, extensible AI agent for installing, executing, editing, and testing work with different LLM providers.
friendlySummary: goose is an open-source, extensible AI agent for installing, executing, editing, and testing work with different LLM providers.
whyItMatters: Use it to experiment with agentic coding workflows without being locked into a single model vendor. Its value is in connecting code edits, commands, and tests into one repeatable loop.
